02211101001222000211 - ASI: 16

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  20 = 2 * 0
  22 = 2 * 2
  001 = 0 * 01
  022 = 0 * 22
  101 = 1 * 01
  211 = 2 * 11
  2000 = 20 * 00
  00122 = 001 * 22
  02211 = 022 * 11
  2000211 = 2000 * 211
  02211101 = 02211 * 101
  001222000211 = 00122 * 2000211
  02211101001222000211 = 02211101 * 001222000211
